description: Use this API to return complex bus parameters. Values may be either nominal or actual. Nominal values return negative values for reactors. Actual values show flow into reactor. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, cmpval = busdt2(ibus, string1, string2)

parameters.name: string1
parameters.description: String indicating the bus quantity desired. (input).

parameters.name: string2
parameters.description: String indicating the units to be used (ignored if string1 = ‘ysz’ or ‘yswz’). (input).

return_values.name: cmpval
return_values.description: Complex value indicated by string1 in the units indicated by string2. (output).

string1.description: Total in-service constant MVA load.
Total in-service constant current load.
Total in-service constant admittance load.
Total in-service load.
Total in-service scalable constant MVA load.
Total in-service scalable constant current load.
Total in-service scalable constant admittance load.
Total in-service scalable load.
Total in-service fixed constant MVA load.
Total in-service fixed constant current load.
Total in-service fixed constant admittance load.
Total in-service fixed load.
Total in-service fixed bus shunt.
Total nominal in-service zero sequence fixed bus shunt.
Total nominal in-service zero sequence fixed bus shunt in per unit.
In-service switched shunt.
Nominal in-service zero sequence switched shunt.
Nominal in-service zero sequence switched shunt in per unit.
Total in-service negative sequence load (pu nominal).
Total in-service zero sequence load (pu nominal).

string2.description: Actual load or shunt (nominal shunt for STRING1 = ‘YSZERO’ or ‘YSWZERO’). ‘P’ ‘Q’ returned in MW Mvar.
Actual load or shunt (nominal shunt for STRING1 = ‘YSZERO’ or ‘YSWZERO’). ‘P’ ‘Q’ in units determined by the power output option setting.
Nominal load (at 1.0 pu voltage). ‘P’ ‘Q’ returned in MW Mvar.
Nominal load (at 1.0 pu voltage). ‘P’ ‘Q’ in units determined by the power output option setting.

error_codes.description: Bus not found; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
Bad value of ‘STRING1’ or ‘STRING2’; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
Bus type code 4 or greater; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ returned.
No loads at bus for ‘STRING1’ = ‘MVA’, ‘IL’, ‘YL’, or ‘TOTAL’; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ returned set to zero.
No switched shunt at bus for ‘STRING1’ = ‘YSW’, ‘YSWZERO’ or ‘YSWZ’; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
Sequence data not in case for ‘STRING1’ = ‘YSZERO’, ‘YSZ’, ‘YSWZERO’, ‘YSWZ’, ‘SHUNTN’ or ‘SHUNTZ’; ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
